TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ManagedDisk extends Azure.Provisioning.Primitives.ProvisionableResource

Docs.summary: ManagedDisk.

MemberSignature.Value: public ManagedDisk (string bicepIdentifier, string? resourceVersion = default);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string bicepIdentifier, string resourceVersion) cil managed
Public Sub New (bicepIdentifier As String, Optional resourceVersion As String = Nothing)

Docs.param: The the Bicep identifier name of the ManagedDisk resource. This can be used to refer to the resource in expressions, but is not the Azure name of the resource. This value can contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
Docs.summary: Creates a new ManagedDisk.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property AvailabilityActionOnDiskDelay As BicepValue(Of AvailabilityPolicyDiskDelay)

Docs.summary: Determines on how to handle disks with slow I/O.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property BurstingEnabled As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.BurstingEnabled : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Set to true to enable bursting beyond the provisioned performance target of the disk. Bursting is disabled by default. Does not apply to Ultra disks.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property BurstingEnabledOn As BicepValue(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: Latest time when bursting was last enabled on a disk.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property CompletionPercent As BicepValue(Of Single)
member this.CompletionPercent : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<single> with get, set

Docs.summary: Percentage complete for the background copy when a resource is created via the CopyStart operation.
Disk source information. CreationData information cannot be changed after the disk has been created.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DataAccessAuthMode As BicepValue(Of DataAccessAuthMode)

Docs.summary: Additional authentication requirements when exporting or uploading to a disk or snapshot.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DefineProvisionableProperties() cil managed

Docs.summary: Define all the provisionable properties of ManagedDisk.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskAccessId As BicepValue(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: ARM id of the DiskAccess resource for using private endpoints on disks.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskIopsReadOnly As BicepValue(Of Long)
member this.DiskIopsReadOnly : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int64> with get, set

Docs.summary: The total number of IOPS that will be allowed across all VMs mounting the shared disk as ReadOnly. One operation can transfer between 4k and 256k bytes.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskIopsReadWrite As BicepValue(Of Long)
member this.DiskIopsReadWrite : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int64> with get, set

Docs.summary: The number of IOPS allowed for this disk; only settable for UltraSSD disks. One operation can transfer between 4k and 256k bytes.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskMBpsReadOnly As BicepValue(Of Long)
member this.DiskMBpsReadOnly : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int64> with get, set

Docs.summary: The total throughput (MBps) that will be allowed across all VMs mounting the shared disk as ReadOnly. MBps means millions of bytes per second - MB here uses the ISO notation, of powers of 10.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskMBpsReadWrite As BicepValue(Of Long)
member this.DiskMBpsReadWrite : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int64> with get, set

Docs.summary: The bandwidth allowed for this disk; only settable for UltraSSD disks. MBps means millions of bytes per second - MB here uses the ISO notation, of powers of 10.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DiskSizeBytes As BicepValue(Of Long)

Docs.summary: The size of the disk in bytes. This field is read only.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DiskSizeGB As BicepValue(Of Integer)
member this.DiskSizeGB : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: If creationData.createOption is Empty, this field is mandatory and it indicates the size of the disk to create. If this field is present for updates or creation with other options, it indicates a resize. Resizes are only allowed if the disk is not attached to a running VM, and can only increase the disk's size.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DiskState As BicepValue(Of DiskState)

Docs.summary: The state of the disk.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Encryption : Azure.Provisioning.Compute.DiskEncryption with get, set

Docs.summary: Encryption property can be used to encrypt data at rest with customer managed keys or platform managed keys.
Encryption settings collection used for Azure Disk Encryption, can contain multiple encryption settings per disk or snapshot.
The extended location where the disk will be created. Extended location cannot be changed.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.Provisioning.Compute.ManagedDisk FromExisting (string bicepIdentifier, string? resourceVersion = default);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.Provisioning.Compute.ManagedDisk FromExisting(string bicepIdentifier, string resourceVersion) cil managed
Public Shared Function FromExisting (bicepIdentifier As String, Optional resourceVersion As String = Nothing) As ManagedDisk
static member FromExisting : string * string -> Azure.Provisioning.Compute.ManagedDisk

Docs.param: The the Bicep identifier name of the ManagedDisk resource. This can be used to refer to the resource in expressions, but is not the Azure name of the resource. This value can contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
Docs.summary: Creates a reference to an existing ManagedDisk.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property HyperVGeneration As BicepValue(Of HyperVGeneration)

Docs.summary: The hypervisor generation of the Virtual Machine. Applicable to OS disks only.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Id As BicepValue(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: Gets the Id.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property IsOptimizedForFrequentAttach As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.IsOptimizedForFrequentAttach : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Setting this property to true improves reliability and performance of data disks that are frequently (more than 5 times a day) by detached from one virtual machine and attached to another. This property should not be set for disks that are not detached and attached frequently as it causes the disks to not align with the fault domain of the virtual machine.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LastOwnershipUpdateOn As BicepValue(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The UTC time when the ownership state of the disk was last changed i.e., the time the disk was last attached or detached from a VM or the time when the VM to which the disk was attached was deallocated or started.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Location As BicepValue(Of AzureLocation)

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the Location.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ManagedBy As BicepValue(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: A relative URI containing the ID of the VM that has the disk attached.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ManagedByExtended As BicepList(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: List of relative URIs containing the IDs of the VMs that have the disk attached. maxShares should be set to a value greater than one for disks to allow attaching them to multiple VMs.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property MaxShares As BicepValue(Of Integer)
member this.MaxShares : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The maximum number of VMs that can attach to the disk at the same time. Value greater than one indicates a disk that can be mounted on multiple VMs at the same time.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Name As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.Name : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: The name of the managed disk that is being created. The name can't be changed after the disk is created. Supported characters for the name are a-z, A-Z, 0-9, _ and -. The maximum name length is 80 characters.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property NetworkAccessPolicy As BicepValue(Of NetworkAccessPolicy)

Docs.summary: Policy for accessing the disk via network.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property OSType As BicepValue(Of SupportedOperatingSystemType)

Docs.summary: The Operating System type.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PropertyUpdatesInProgressTargetTier As BicepValue(Of String)

Docs.summary: The target performance tier of the disk if a tier change operation is in progress.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ProvisioningState As BicepValue(Of String)

Docs.summary: The disk provisioning state.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublicNetworkAccess As BicepValue(Of DiskPublicNetworkAccess)

Docs.summary: Policy for controlling export on the disk.
Purchase plan information for the the image from which the OS disk was created. E.g. - {name: 2019-Datacenter, publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer, product: WindowsServer}.
Contains the security related information for the resource.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ShareInfo As BicepList(Of ShareInfoElement)

Docs.summary: Details of the list of all VMs that have the disk attached. maxShares should be set to a value greater than one for disks to allow attaching them to multiple VMs.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Sku : Azure.Provisioning.Compute.DiskSku with get, set

Docs.summary: The disks sku name. Can be Standard_LRS, Premium_LRS, StandardSSD_LRS, UltraSSD_LRS, Premium_ZRS, StandardSSD_ZRS, or PremiumV2_LRS.
List of supported capabilities for the image from which the OS disk was created.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property SupportsHibernation As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.SupportsHibernation : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates the OS on a disk supports hibernation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SystemData As SystemData

Docs.summary: Gets the SystemData.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Tags As BicepDictionary(Of String)

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the Tags.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Tier As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.Tier : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: Performance tier of the disk (e.g, P4, S10) as described here: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/managed-disks/. Does not apply to Ultra disks.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property TimeCreated As BicepValue(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The time when the disk was created.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property UniqueId As BicepValue(Of String)

Docs.summary: Unique Guid identifying the resource.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Zones As BicepList(Of String)
member this.Zones : Azure.Provisioning.BicepList<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: The Logical zone list for Disk.
